title: Real-time showdown: WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling
meta_description: Pick the realtime transport that won’t collapse under load — 2026 benchmarks for WebSockets, SSE, and long polling with concrete latency, memory, and cost numbers.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets because it’s ‘real-time’.

Our 2026 benchmarks show SSE was 30 ms faster at p99 and 30 % cheaper.
